response.overview: Harith (Hafidz Roshdi) and Fayyadh (Adam Lee) are half-brothers with different fathers. Harith is the eldest son of Arisa (Dynas Mokhtar) from her marriage to Bakri, while Fayyadh is Arisa's son with Kamal (Hasnul Rahmat), her personal driver whom she married after Bakri's death. Arisa never loved Kamal, but they married at the suggestion of Arisa's mother, Dato' Ainon (Fauziah Nawi). Twenty years have passed, and Harith and Fayyadh are now adults. Despite having other interests, they pursue a business degree at Dato' Ainon's request. Harith wishes to deepen his religious knowledge. Harith is active in association activities and charitable work. On weekends, Harith attends lectures by Ustaz Razak. Fayyadh is more inclined towards the glamorous world and interested in fashion. Besides being involved in modeling, Fayyadh often spends time socializing.
response.title: Harith Fayyadh
